findings.title: Global control plane on Kubernetes
findings.detail: Global CP on Kubernetes is dropped as a deployment mode in 3.0; migrate the global CP to Universal.

findings.title: Inbound tags still enabled
findings.detail: 3.0 runs with inbound tags disabled (label-based MeshService selection); set `inboundTagsDisabled: true` and validate before upgrading.

findings.title: Unified resource naming not enabled
findings.detail: 3.0 assumes the unified (KRI-based) resource naming model; enable `unifiedResourceNamingEnabled` and validate before upgrading.

findings.title: autoReachableServices enabled
findings.detail: `autoReachableServices` is removed entirely in 3.0; stop relying on it before upgrading.

findings.title: eBPF transparent proxy enabled
findings.detail: The eBPF transparent proxy is removed in 3.0; switch to the iptables transparent proxy.

findings.title: meshServices.mode is not Exclusive
findings.detail: 3.0 requires `meshServices.mode: Exclusive` (it gates Zone Proxy, MeshIdentity and disables legacy kuma.io/service routing); migrate before upgrading (current: Disabled).

findings.title: Delta xDS not enabled
findings.detail: Delta xDS becomes the only xDS mode in 3.0; enable `deltaXds` and validate first.

findings.title: KDS event-based watchdog not enabled
findings.detail: The KDS event-based watchdog moves to the default in 3.0; enable it and validate first.

findings.title: Native sidecar containers not enabled
findings.detail: Native sidecar containers move to the default in 3.0; enable `sidecarContainers` and validate first.

findings.title: Dataplane has a per-proxy metrics override
findings.detail: `Dataplane.spec.metrics` (from `prometheus.metrics.kuma.io/*` annotations on k8s) is deprecated; move per-proxy metrics to the MeshMetric policy.

findings.title: Dataplane has a probes section
findings.detail: Dataplane `spec.probes` is removed for Universal in 3.0 (app-probe-proxy supersedes it).

findings.title: Dataplane is version-incompatible with the control plane
findings.detail: The control plane reports this proxy's kuma-dp version as incompatible; bring it into the supported skew window before upgrading to 3.0.

findings.title: MeshService name is not a valid RFC-1035 DNS label
findings.detail: Rename to a lowercase RFC-1035 DNS label (≤63 chars, starting with a letter); non-conforming names are deprecated in 3.0.

findings.title: zoneingresses present
findings.detail: ZoneIngress/ZoneEgress are superseded by the unified Zone Proxy in Exclusive mode.

manualChecks: Gateway API / GAMMA usage migrated off built-in support
Observability: KRI-based config only; `install observability` command removed
DNS: CoreDNS removed (legacy Envoy DNS filter use is auto-detected with --inspect-dataplanes)
Old inspect APIs removed (switch to the new inspect API)
Pod resources instead of container resources
Adopt the Workload resource for proxy grouping (metrics/traces dimension) instead of kuma.io/service tags
Rotate legacy HMAC256 signing keys (pre-1.4.x) to asymmetric RSA/ECDSA
Replace the `kuma.io/mesh` annotation with the `kuma.io/mesh` label
Zone-pinned external services (legacy ExternalService `kuma.io/zone` tag — already a blocker; MeshExternalService has no zone field)
